testcase.name: UserWhitelistStrategy returns true only for listed userIds
UserWhitelistStrategy returns false when parameters is null or empty [params: null, #0]
UserWhitelistStrategy returns false when parameters is null or empty [params: {}, #1]
UserWhitelistStrategy returns false when parameters is null or empty [params: {"userIds": []}, #2]
PercentageRolloutStrategy is deterministic for same userId and flagKey
PercentageRolloutStrategy returns false when userId is absent
PercentageRolloutStrategy returns false for 0% and true for 100%
